MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANTS FIRE INSURANCE EXCHANGE AND KATHRYN KLAUS, ESQ. DEMURRER TO THE PLAINTIFFS' "LEAVE OF COURT TO AMEND AND NOTICE MOTION".

APPEARANCES: Rizalina Abellan, 577-3704 pltf & opposing party in propria persona; Richard S. Baum, Esq. of Coddington, Hicks & Danforth 650/592-5400 for defts & moving parties.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - SUSTAIN WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. PROBATE COURT HAD JURISDICTION OVER THIS MATTER AND THIS ACTION SEEKS TO RE-LITIGATE THAT COURT'S DETERMINATIONS. NO OPPOSITION FILED. Defendant to submit a proposed form of order. (302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797
